objectives: Install and configure Android Studio for Android development
Create and run a basic Kotlin Android project
Understand the role of the Android Sdk and Gradle in building and running apps
learning_path.title: Android Development Environment Setup and First Kotlin App

objectives: Use debugging tools to inspect app state during runtime
Identify and fix common runtime issues in a Kotlin Android app
Practice iterative testing and verification while developing
learning_path.title: Debugging Fundamentals in Android Studio

objectives: Build UI screens using Jetpack Compose
Structure UI code for readability and reuse
Run and validate UI changes through the development workflow
learning_path.title: UI Development with Jetpack Compose

objectives: Manage UI state using Viewmodel
Handle screen lifecycle changes safely
Connect UI built with Jetpack Compose to Viewmodel-driven state
learning_path.title: App Architecture with Android Jetpack: Lifecycle and Viewmodel

objectives: Use Coroutines to perform background work safely
Integrate Coroutines with Viewmodel-based state management
Avoid UI blocking while performing long-running operations
learning_path.title: Asynchronous Programming with Coroutines

objectives: Perform Json/Http requests to a REST endpoint
Parse and use API responses in the app
Combine Coroutines with network calls to keep the UI responsive
learning_path.title: Networking with Rest Apis (Json/Http)

objectives: Design a local persistence layer using Room concepts
Store and retrieve app data locally
Connect persisted data to UI state updates
learning_path.title: Local Data Storage with Sqlite/Room Persistence

objectives: Implement multi-screen navigation
Pass data between screens while preserving state
Validate navigation behavior through debugging
learning_path.title: Navigation and Screen Flow with Android Jetpack

objectives: Apply Dependency Injection to manage object creation and lifecycles
Integrate Dependency Injection with Viewmodel and persistence usage
Improve modularity and testability through structured dependencies
learning_path.title: Dependency Injection with Hilt/Dagger

objectives: Configure build variants and dependencies using Gradle
Understand how Gradle interacts with the Android Sdk and Android Studio
Troubleshoot common build and dependency issues
learning_path.title: Build Configuration and Project Structure with Gradle

objectives: Apply a repeatable workflow for managing changes in an Android project
Coordinate project updates alongside Gradle configuration changes
Maintain a stable development process across iterations
learning_path.title: Software Configuration Management Workflow for Android Projects

objectives: Relate digital systems fundamentals to device behavior and performance constraints
Reason about how underlying system behavior can influence app responsiveness
Use debugging observations to connect software behavior to system-level effects
learning_path.title: Digital Systems Concepts for Mobile Developers

matched_occupation.description: Mobile application developers implement applications software for mobile devices, based on the designs provided, using general or specific development tools for device operating systems.
matched_occupation.label: mobile application developer
